hooks.command: bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); [ -f "$ROOT/gradle.properties" ] && V=$(grep "^VERSION_NAME=" "$ROOT/gradle.properties" | cut -d= -f2); for f in sceneview/gradle.properties arsceneview/gradle.properties sceneview-core/gradle.properties; do [ -f "$ROOT/$f" ] && FV=$(grep "^VERSION_NAME=" "$ROOT/$f" | cut -d= -f2) && [ "$FV" != "$V" ] && echo "VERSION MISMATCH: $f has $FV but root has $V" && exit 1; done; exit 0'
echo 'VERSION EDITED — Remember to update ALL version locations: gradle.properties (root + modules), mcp/package.json, llms.txt, README.md, CLAUDE.md, website'
echo 'ANDROID API CHANGED — Check if corresponding change is needed in: SceneViewSwift/, sceneview-web/, llms.txt'
echo 'SWIFT API CHANGED — Check if corresponding change is needed in: sceneview/ (Android), llms.txt (iOS section)'
echo 'PUSHED — Remember: if this is a release, update CLAUDE.md session state and website version references'
